mapper.select: /* QUERYID(PushBatchMapper.getPushScheduleList : 푸쉬 스케줄 조회) */ SELECT TUPB.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO /* 푸쉬발송설정일련번호 */ , TUPB.SND_PROC_DIV /* 발송처리구분 */ , TUPB.SND_CNT_DIV /* 발송횟수구분 */ , TUPB.SND_DT_DIV /* 발송일구분 */ , TUPB.SND_TIME /* 발송시간 */ , TUPB.APPROVE_YN /* 승인여부 */ , TUPB.APLY_STRT_DTIME /* 사용기간시작일 */ , TUPB.APLY_END_DTIME /* 사용기간종료일 */ , TUPB.MSG_TP /* 메시지유형 */ , TUPB.PUSH_TP /* 푸쉬유형 */ , TUPB.PUSH_ICON_TP /* 푸쉬아이콘 */ , TUPB.PUSH_WORK_TP /* 푸쉬대상업무유형 */ , TUPB.SND_TITLE /* 발송제목 */ , TUPB.SND_MSG /* 발송메시지 */ , TUPB.PUSH_IMG_URL /* 푸쉬 이미지경로 */ , TUPB.PUSH_IMG_NM /* 푸쉬 이미지명 */ , TUPB.LINK_DIV /* 링크구분 */ , TUPB.LINK_URL /* 링크URL */ , TUPB.PUSH_SND_PROC_NO /* 푸쉬발송고유번호 */ , TUPS.SND_DOW_LST /* 발송요일목록 */ , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'd') SND_DOW /* 발송요일 */ , CASE WHEN TUPS.SND_DAYS = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'DD') THEN TUPS.SND_DAYS ELSE NULL END AS SND_DAYS /* 발송일 */ , CASE WHEN TUPS.SND_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'YYYYMMDD') THEN TUPS.SND_DT ELSE NULL END AS SND_DT /* 발송일자 */ , TUPI.SND_TARGET_EXTR_DIV /* 발송대상자추출구분 */ , TUPI.APP_OS_TP /* 단말기OS유형 */ , TUPI.AND_OS_VER_LST /* 안드로이드 OS버전목록 */ , TUPI.AND_INSTL_VER_LST /* 안드로이드 APP 설치버전목록 */ , TUPI.IOS_OS_VER_LST /* IOS OS버전목록 */ , TUPI.IOS_INSTL_VER_LST /* IOS APP 설치버전목록 */ , TUPI.CUST_TP /* 고객선택조건유형 */ , TUPI.CUST_DIV_LST /* 고객구분목록 */ FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_SETUP_BASE TUPB /* 푸쉬발송설정관리 */ LEFT JOIN NMCP_PUSH_SND_SCHDUL_BASE TUPS /* 푸쉬발송스케줄관리 */ ON TUPB.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO = TUPS.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO LEFT JOIN NMCP_PUSH_SND_TRGT_EXTR_INFO TUPI /* 푸쉬발송대상자추출조건 */ ON TUPB.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO = TUPI.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO WHERE TUPB.SND_PROC_DIV = #{sndProcDiv} AND TUPB.APPROVE_YN =#{approveYn} AND (TUPB.SND_TIME IS NULL OR TUPB.SND_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE , 'HH24')) AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN TUPB.APLY_STRT_DTIME AND TUPB.APLY_END_DTIME ORDER BY TUPB.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO DESC

/* QUERYID(pushBatch.getPushSndProcCount : 푸쉬 발송 처리 대상자 카운트) */ SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_TRGT_LIST WHERE PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO = #{pushSndProcSno} /* 푸쉬발송처리일련번호 */ AND PUSH_SND_SET_SNO = #{pushSndSetSno} /* 푸쉬발송설정일련번호 */
mapper.update: /* QUERYID(pushBatch.mergePushSndRst : 푸쉬 발송 결과 업데이트) */ MERGE INTO NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_RST_LIST A USING ( SELECT PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO , SUM(CASE WHEN APP_COLCT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS SUCCESS_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN APP_COLCT_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS FAIL_CNT , MIN(SND_PROC_DT) AS SND_PROC_DT FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_TRGT_LIST TUPSPTL WHERE NVL(SND_TEST_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND SND_PROC_DT BETWEEN TO_TIMESTAMP(SYSDATE - 1) AND TO_TIMESTAMP(SYSDATE) GROUP BY PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO ) B ON (A.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO = B.PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.SUCCESS_CNT = B.SUCCESS_CNT , A.FAIL_CNT = B.FAIL_CNT , A.SND_PROC_DT = B.SND_PROC_DT , A.SYS_CHG_ID= #{sysModId} , A.SYS_CHG_DTIME = SYSTIMESTAMP
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO NMCP_PUSH_SND_PROC_TRGT_LIST ( PUSH_SND_PROC_SNO /*푸쉬발송처리일련번호*/ ,PUSH_SND_SET_SNO /*실시간발송이력위해관리*/ ,USERID /*고객id*/ ,CELL_NO /*핸드폰번호*/ ,APP_OS_TP /*A:Android, I:IOS*/ ,PROC_ST /*코드값(Y : 발송 / N : 대기 / X : 오류)*/ ,APP_OS_VER /*단말기OS버전*/ ,SND_PROC_DT /*발송처리일자*/ ,SERVER_COLCT_YN /*코드값(Y : 수집 / N : 미수집) / 서버에서 결과값을 등록*/ ,APP_COLCT_YN /*코드값(Y : 수집 / N : 미수집) / 앱에서 연동API를 통한 결과값을 등록*/ ,PUSH_ICON_TP /* 푸쉬아이콘유형*/ ,SND_TITLE /*발송제목*/ ,SND_MSG /*문구/HTML*/
,PUSH_IMG_URL
,PUSH_IMG_NM /*NAS 이미지 명*/
,LINK_DIV /*A:App실행, O:외부링크*/
,LINK_URL /* 링크URL*/
,SND_CNT /*default: 1 , 최대 5회 재발송*/ ,SND_TEST_YN /*코드값(Y : 테스트발송 / N : 실제발송)*/ ,TGT_SERVER /*타겟서버*/ ,SYS_REG_IP ,SYS_REG_DTIME ,SYS_REG_ID ,SYS_CHG_IP ,SYS_CHG_DTIME ,SYS_CHG_ID ) SELECT #{pushSndSetSno} /* 푸쉬발송설정일련번호 */ , #{pushSndProcSno} /* 푸쉬발송처리일련번호 */ , A.USERID /* 회원번호 */ , A.MOBILE_NO /* 핸드폰번호 */ , A.OS /* 단말기OS유형 */ , #{procSt} /* 처리상태 */ , A.APP_OS_VER , SYSDATE , #{serverColctYn} /* 서버수집여부 */ , #{appColctYn} /* 앱수집여부 */ , #{pushIconTp} /* 푸쉬아이콘 */ , #{sndTitle} , #{sndMsg} /* 발송메시지 */
, #{pushImgUrl} /* 푸쉬 이미지 */
, #{pushImgNm} /* 푸쉬 이미지 */
, #{linkDiv} /* 링크구분 */
, #{linkUrl} /* 링크URL */
, #{sndCnt} /* 발송횟수 */ , #{sndTestYn} /* 발송테스트여부 */ , 'admin' , #{sysRegIp} /* 시스템등록아이디 */ , SYSDATE /* 시스템등록일시 */ , #{sysRegId} /* 시스템등록아이디 */ , #{sysRegIp} /* 시스템수정아이디 */ , SYSDATE /* 시스템수정일시 */ , #{sysRegId} /* 시스템수정아이디 */ FROM ( SELECT TMMB.USERID /* 회원넘버 */ , TMMB.MOBILE_NO /* 휴대폰번호 */ , TUMAI.OS /* APP 설치버전 */ , TUMAI.UDID , CASE WHEN INSTR(APP_OS_VER,'.',1,2) > 0 THEN SUBSTR(APP_OS_VER,1,INSTR(APP_OS_VER,'.',1,2)-1) WHEN INSTR(APP_OS_VER,'.',1,1) = 0 THEN APP_OS_VER || '.0' ELSE APP_OS_VER END AS APP_OS_VER , TUMAI.SEND_YN ,TUMAI.VERSION FROM MCP_USER TMMB LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS,APP_OS_VER,VERSION FROM ( SELECT UUID, UDID, USER_ID,LAST_ACCESS_DT,SEND_YN,OS,APP_OS_VER,VERSION, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY USER_ID ORDER BY UP_DT DESC) AS RNK FROM NMCP_USR_APP_INFO WHERE UDID IS NOT NULL ) WHERE RNK = '1' ) TUMAI ON TMMB.USERID = TUMAI.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PUSH_SND_SET_SNO , USERID FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY PUSH_SND_SET_SNO, PUSH_SND_SET_SNO ORDER BY SYS_CHG_DTIME DESC) AS ITEM_NO , PUSH_SND_SET_SNO , USERID FROM NMCP_PUSH_SND_TRGT_LIST ) WHERE ITEM_NO = 1 ) TUPSI ON TMMB.USERID = TUPSI.USERID WHERE REVOCATION_DATE IS NULL /* 탈퇴일자 */ AND TUMAI.SEND_YN = 'Y'
AND TUPSI.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO = #{pushSndSetSno}
ORDER BY TUPSI.PUSH_SND_SET_SNO )A
